MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Stanley G. Hilton, Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 8. (Administrative fee) is scheduled today. There being no appearance or a response to the OSC filed, court ordered Stanley G. Hilton, Esq., sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long. (212).

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
